description: Three groups of 3 drones, all mutually attracting + rotating together. Ported from research preset 3_encapsulate_rotate.json (k_pos = position_matrix, k_rot = orientation_matrix). Nested-shell encapsulation: species 0 cores, species 1 forms first ring, species 2 outermost. Symmetric K_rot=1.0 → coherent global swirl.
